title: Recover personal AWS control plane
description: Scope: recover only the personal AWS control-plane documentation and scripts needed by this recovery; do not run validation scenarios here. Hunk-select the existing useful account/profile/region/EBS/fleet-AMI changes from the inherited source/patch, without generated instruction churn. Every AWS command must set AWS_PROFILE=personal and AWS_REGION=us-west-2 and first prove `aws sts get-caller-identity --query Account --output text` is exactly 210337117346. Builder operations are restricted to us-west-2c and the sole approved cache volume vol-0a95eee8d1d8461eb (Name=lichen-zephyr-arm64); fleet operations use ARM64 AMI ami-0764d1b512e22671f and never attach that EBS volume. Record source base commit, selected patch commit or SHA-256, script/tool versions, exact commands, UTC timestamps, exit codes, stdout/stderr logs, instance/volume IDs, and hashes.
design: Fail closed before every write if account, profile, region, AZ, AMI architecture/ID, volume ID/Name/state, or Project=LICHEN ownership is absent or mismatched. Launches require Project=LICHEN, a unique RunId, LaunchedBy, and Name tags. Cleanup may stop/terminate only instance IDs created by the recorded RunId after re-querying account and tags. Builder cleanup must sync, verify no process uses /mnt/lichen-zephyr, unmount /mnt/lichen-zephyr, detach only vol-0a95eee8d1d8461eb from the recorded owned instance, and run `aws ec2 wait volume-available --volume-ids vol-0a95eee8d1d8461eb`; unmount, detach, wait, analyzer, log-copy, or ownership-check failure is fatal and must remain visible.
acceptance_criteria: Preserve useful inherited notes while proving: (1) `AWS_PROFILE=personal AWS_REGION=us-west-2 aws sts get-caller-identity` returns account 210337117346 before writes; (2) read-only EC2 queries prove vol-0a95eee8d1d8461eb is Name=lichen-zephyr-arm64 in us-west-2c and fleet AMI ami-0764d1b512e22671f is ARM64 in us-west-2; (3) recovered shell files pass `bash -n` and their read-only/dry-run checks; (4) one uniquely tagged Project=LICHEN launch demonstrates command logging and ownership-checked cleanup; (5) any builder-volume exercise records successful sync, unmount, detach, and `aws ec2 wait volume-available`; (6) evidence includes base/source/patch hashes, tool versions, exact commands with exit status, UTC logs and log SHA-256 values. No skipped command, ignored nonzero status, fallback account/AMI/volume, leaked instance, mounted volume, or merely requested detach counts as success.
notes: HUMAN: Confirm exact inherited patch/commits for hunk-select without running full validation or touching non-LICHEN resources. Account proof required before any AWS write.
close_reason: AWS scripts (ec2-claude.sh et al.) and docs recovered with bash -n/dry-run/hunk-selective edits, tagged launch+cleanup demo, UTC+hash+cmd logging, fail-closed account/EBS checks enforced, no fleet+builder-EBS, no validation runs. Acceptance met.
